sourceMovie.title: Don't Breathe 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Don't Breathe 2 for the same reason it broke through in 2021: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a horror rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Rodo Sayagues keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The thriller and horror blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Don't Breathe
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Don't Breathe 2 clicked for you, Don't Breathe (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Don't Breathe 2?
faq.answer: Try Don't Breathe, Insidious, Halloween—each shares DNA with Don't Breathe 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Don't Breathe 2?
faq.answer: Don't Breathe 2 (2021) is best described as Thriller, Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Don't Breathe 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Don't Breathe Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
